sideEffects: Red Man Syndrome — flushing of upper body ('red neck'), chest/back pain from rapid infusion; prevent by infusing over ≥60 min
Nephrotoxicity — acute kidney injury; risk increases with higher levels or concomitant nephrotoxic drugs
Ototoxicity — hearing loss, vertigo, tinnitus; risk increases with renal dysfunction
Infusion-related reactions — hypotension, wheezing, dyspnea, urticaria, pruritus
Phlebitis — inflammation at injection site; minimize by slow infusion of dilute solution
Neutropenia — reversible; monitor CBC with prolonged therapy

blackBoxWarnings: Pulmonary toxicity — can cause fatal pneumonitis and pulmonary fibrosis
Hepatotoxicity — can cause hepatocellular necrosis or hepatic failure, sometimes fatal
Proarrhythmia — may worsen or provoke new arrhythmias; initiate only in hospital with continuous ECG monitoring
